title: Sandwind Team (Sriluur)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] team on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]|[[Sandwind group|Sandwind Team (Tatooine)]]}}
'''Sandwind team''' was an undercover group in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], which was active on the planet [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], specifically the [[Lesser Cueva Expanse]].

The team had ties to the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]] and was responsible for several successful missions in the area around the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]. They also purchased several starships from Sprax for much less than the Rebel Alliance would have normally paid.

There were six members of the Sandwind Team on Sriluur. The unit was commanded by [[Near-Human]] Lieutenant [[Jodar Frein]] with [[Rallan]] the [[Tratlin]] as his first officer. The other members were the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Redlio]], the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Ka'i'lorshin]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Plin Shardona]], and the [[Reigat]] [[Moldisin]].
